text.title: HAProxy Production Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the lb-haproxy-production methodology end-to-end.

step.name: size-host
step.input: Available host CPU + RAM + expected peak QPS / concurrent conns.
step.action: Compute `nbthread` = physical cores. Compute `maxconn` ≈ (RAM_bytes - 512 MiB OS reserve) / 16 KiB. Decide HA mode (keepalived-vrrp / anycast / single).

step.name: write-global-defaults
step.action: Render `global` block: `daemon`, `nbthread N`, `cpu-map auto:1/1-N 0-(N-1)`, `tune.ssl.default-dh-param 2048`, `ssl-default-bind-options no-sslv3 no-tlsv10 no-tlsv11`. Render `defaults`: `mode http`, `option httplog`, timeouts.

step.name: write-frontend-and-acls
step.input: Domain list + path routing rules + rate-limit policy.
step.action: Render `frontend https_front bind *:443 ssl crt ...`. Add `stick-table type ip size 100k expire 10m store http_req_rate(10s)`. Add `http-request deny deny_status 429 if { sc_http_req_rate(0) gt N }`. Add ACL rules per host/path.

step.name: write-backends-with-checks
step.action: Render `backend ... balance leastconn option httpchk GET /health http-check expect status 200 server srv1 ip:port check inter 10s fall 3 rise 2`. Configure cookie-based persistence if session affinity is required.

step.name: ha-wire-validate
step.action: Render `keepalived.conf` with VRRP instance + `track_script` checking HAProxy systemd unit. Run `haproxy -c -f haproxy.cfg`. Run `validate-lb-haproxy-production.py --file artefact.json`. Failover test by stopping HAProxy on master and confirming the VIP migrates to backup within 2 s.
step.output: Active-passive cluster up; first request flowing.
step.decision-gate: If failover takes > 5 s, debug VRRP keepalive interval before going live.
